title: Play the Traxler
description: Take Black and counterattack the Knight Attack with the Traxler.

setup.pgn:
[Event "Traxler Counterattack"]
[Result "*"]

1. e4 e5 2. Nf3 Nc6 3. Bc4 Nf6 4. Ng5 *

solution.pgn:
[Event "Traxler Solution"]
[Result "*"]

1. e4 e5 2. Nf3 Nc6 3. Bc4 Nf6 4. Ng5 Bc5 5. Nxf7 Bxf2+ 6. Kxf2 Nxe4+ 7. Kg1 Qh4 *
solution.explanation: The Traxler ignores the attack on f7 and immediately counterattacks f2. If White grabs on f7, Black sacrifices the bishop with Bxf2+, drags the king forward, then follows with Nxe4+ and Qh4. The point is not to win material immediately, but to pull White’s king into the open and flood the position with threats.
